metadata.title: Blocked due to missing_inputs and unsafe certainty. No valid objective can be compiled.

mission.primary_objective: Blocked due to missing_inputs and unsafe certainty. No valid objective can be compiled.
mission.success_definition: Blocked. No measurable criteria provided; ambiguous acceptance criteria cannot be validated.

in_scope.item: Blocked. Required inputs: repo name, refactor scope, operator_lens parameters, acceptance criteria.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Blocked. No measurable criteria provided; ambiguous acceptance criteria cannot be validated.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.memory_subject: Blocked due to missing_inputs and unsafe certainty. No valid objective can be compiled.

memory_content.item: Blocked. Required inputs: repo name, refactor scope, operator_lens parameters, acceptance criteria.

SRXML_Artifact.overwrite_policy: Do not overwrite existing memory without approval.

verification_gate.item: Blocked. No measurable criteria provided; ambiguous acceptance criteria cannot be validated.

safety_limits.item: Blocked. Missing compliance, memory, and ROI constraints. Urgent language overrides safe defaults.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: The raw_intent contains missing_inputs (no repo name, no refactor scope, no operator_lens parameters), ambiguous acceptance criteria, and urgent language that precludes safe compilation. The student_builder role and East Asia context introduce unverified compliance and memory constraints. Blocking to prevent unsafe execution.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
